answer:
A WhatsApp Business MCP server is a bridge that connects AI assistants like Claude to the official Meta WhatsApp Cloud API via the Model Context Protocol [1][2][3]. These servers expose WhatsApp functionality—such as sending text, media, interactive messages, and managing templates—as tools that an AI can invoke through natural language [1][2][4].

While most implementations directly interface with the official Meta Graph API to ensure compliance and reliability [1][2][5], some utilize third-party intermediaries like GreenAPI [6]. Deployment typically occurs via stdio for local clients like Claude Desktop or via HTTP/SSE for remote environments [1][5][6].
